meta.listDescription: Review article records, status, and limited create/edit/publish/archive actions within the current admin scope.

list.title: Article operations baseline
list.note: This surface is an operational baseline. It supports article creation/editing plus limited publish/archive actions within the current backend contract.

items.list: Review article records with status, locale, and category context.
items.publish: Publish a draft article when the backend allows it.
items.archive: Archive draft or published articles within the current contract.

items.noEditor: Full collaborative editorial workflows are outside this baseline.
items.noScheduling: Scheduling, versioning, and editorial approvals remain outside scope.
items.noAnalytics: Performance analytics and content insights are not included here.

archiveConfirm.title: Archive this article?
archiveConfirm.description: Archive only when this article should no longer stay active in the current admin article baseline.

actions.notAvailable: No publish/archive action is available for this status.

form.createNote: Create a draft article inside the current admin article contract.
form.editNote: Update the selected article inside the current admin article contract.

validation.required: Category, title, and content are required.

empty.heading: No articles found
empty.note: No articles match the current filters.

listError.heading: Articles list is not available right now

errors.localeRequired: A locale is required for translation updates.
errors.invalidPublishTransition: This article cannot be published in its current state.
errors.invalidArchiveTransition: This article cannot be archived in its current state.
errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save the changes. Please review the form and try again.
errors.coverUploadFailed: Could not upload the cover image.
errors.generic: Could not complete this article action right now.
